atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports persistent right elbow pain

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports right elbow pain exacerbated by gripping and lifting

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient states the pain started approximately two weeks ago after yard work

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient denies any recent trauma

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports using over-the-counter ibuprofen with minimal relief

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Exam reveals tenderness to palpation over the medial epicondylitis area

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Range of motion is limited by pain

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Grip strength is decreased on the right hand

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: No swelling or erythema is noted

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient's symptoms and exam findings are consistent with medial epicondylitis

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The doctor instructs the patient to apply ice to the elbow three times daily

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The doctor recommends physical therapy for strengthening exercises
